chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1180 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.5897/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.04.2022 Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Sajjad Ali Memon, Advocate for respondents No.2 and 3. == The petitioner being Assistant Professor Institute of Petroleum and Gas Engineering, Mehran University of Engineering and Technology Jamshoro was imposed a major penalty of his compulsory retirement from service vide order dated 10.08.2020 passed by syndicate of the said University, such order the petitioner has impugned before this Court by way of instant petition to be declared illegal, void and contrary to service rules. After arguing the instant petition at some length, it was stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on its merits provided the respondents are directed to dispose of the Departmental Appeal of the petitioner pending with them, within two months after receipt of copy of this order and in case his Departmental Appeal is going to be dismissed by them then his case for release of his pensionary benefits would be considered by them sympathetically, which is not opposed by learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh and counsel for the respondent. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
